name: The Sower Went Out to Sow
oracleText: At the beginning of your end step, if you cast a spell this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. If that creature has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, draw a card.
flavorText: "A sower went out to sow his seed." — Luke 8:5
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Alexandre Bida's "Image of the Sower Parable" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons tags the 1874 work as public-domain.
classics.creditText: Alexandre Bida, Image of the Sower Parable
classics.sourceNotes: Best-fit classical parable image with a known artist.
